title: HyperEyes: Parallel Multimodal Search Agent for Efficient Multi-Entity Visual Search

defines.name: HyperEyes
defines.definition: A parallel multimodal search agent that fuses visual grounding and retrieval into a single atomic action to search multiple entities concurrently with efficiency-aware training.

defines.name: IMEB
defines.definition: A human-curated benchmark that jointly evaluates multimodal search accuracy and search efficiency on multi-entity visual instances.

problem: Existing multimodal search agents search entities sequentially, causing redundant interaction rounds and inefficient trajectories for decomposable multi-entity queries.
